About Me

Strategist. Writer.
Storyteller.

I'm a content strategist, marketer, and storyteller who loves helping technology companies communicate their value more effectively.

Over the past 7+ years, I've worked across content marketing, social media, branding, and SaaS growth initiatives, creating campaigns that connect with audiences and support business goals. Whether it's developing a content strategy, launching a new product, or simplifying complex AI concepts, I enjoy turning ideas into content people actually want to read and share.

When I'm not working, you'll usually find me writing poetry, painting, spending time with my family and pets, rescuing stray cats, or watching horror movies.
